expectations.text: Identifies at least 2 distinct error patterns
expectations.evidence: 5 distinct patterns: Context Overflow, Unnecessary Work, Encoding Issues, Lost Thread, Output Invisible.

expectations.text: Shows frequency (how many sessions each pattern appeared in)
Cites specific sessions for each pattern
expectations.evidence: Session IDs listed for each pattern (e.g., e667d3b9, bd30970f, b6481cfa...).
All 5 patterns have 'Proposed fix' with Target file, Change description, and Draft markdown.

expectations.text: Shorter output than full retrospective (focused mode)
expectations.evidence: 215 lines vs 381 lines for the full weekly retrospective with_skill.

expectations.text: Scans JSONL transcripts, not just CHANGELOG
expectations.evidence: Header: '22 main sessions scanned, 20 within the 7-day window'. Quotes user messages from sessions.
All proposals presented as drafts. No Edit/Write calls to rules/skills.
